chk_message_from.name: chk_message_from
chk_message_from.value: from_claim_id IS NOT NULL OR from_job_id IS NOT NULL

chk_message_to.name: chk_message_to
chk_message_to.value: to_claim_id IS NOT NULL OR to_job_id IS NOT NULL

chk_po_item_parent.name: chk_po_item_parent
chk_po_item_parent.value: (purchase_order_group_id IS NOT NULL AND purchase_order_combo_id IS NULL) OR (purchase_order_group_id IS NULL AND purchase_order_combo_id IS NOT NULL)

chk_po_parent.name: chk_po_parent
chk_po_parent.value: claim_id IS NOT NULL OR job_id IS NOT NULL

chk_quote_item_parent.name: chk_quote_item_parent
chk_quote_item_parent.value: (quote_group_id IS NOT NULL AND quote_combo_id IS NULL) OR (quote_group_id IS NULL AND quote_combo_id IS NOT NULL)

chk_quote_parent.name: chk_quote_parent
chk_quote_parent.value: claim_id IS NOT NULL OR job_id IS NOT NULL

chk_task_parent.name: chk_task_parent
chk_task_parent.value: claim_id IS NOT NULL OR job_id IS NOT NULL
